# Cédric Bonhomme

> Personal site of Cédric Bonhomme, a computer scientist working in information
> security as part of a Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT). The site
> collects blog posts, open-source projects, academic publications, and
> personal notes. Writing focuses mostly on computer security, privacy, and
> free/open-source software, with occasional detours into photography, music,
> and running.

## Core pages

- [About](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/about/): background, role at the CERT, interests, and a link to my resume.
- [Now](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/now/): a regularly-updated snapshot of what I am currently focused on (life, work, music).
- [Software](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/software/): notable open-source projects I built or maintain — including Vulnerability-Lookup and Newspipe.
- [Publications](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/publications/): academic papers and conference contributions.
- [Blog](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/blog/): posts on security, project releases, and personal notes.
- [Contact](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/contact/): email (with OpenPGP fingerprint), Matrix, IRC, Mastodon, and RSS.

## Feeds

- [Blog RSS](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/blog/index.xml): full-content RSS feed of all blog posts.
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/sitemap.xml): canonical XML sitemap.

## Optional

- [Photography](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/photography/): selected photos and notes.
- [Blogroll](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/blogroll/): blogs and people I read.
- [Donations](https://www.cedricbonhomme.org/donations/): open-source projects I support financially.
